description:
The xorg-x11-server-Xwayland package can be removed with the following command: 
$ sudo dnf remove xorg-x11-server-Xwayland
rationale:
Unnecessary service packages must not be installed to decrease the attack
surface of the system. X Windows has a long history of security
vulnerabilities and should not be installed unless approved and documented.
Unless your organization specifically requires graphical login access via
X Windows, remove it to reduce the potential attack surface.
ocil:
The xorg-x11-server-Xwayland package can be removed with the following command: 
$ sudo dnf remove xorg-x11-server-Xwayland
title: Remove the X Windows Xwayland Package
